name: Blubuzzard, Inc.
summary: Blubuzzard, Inc. operates as a startup fintech company. The company is developing an application for nuggets. It builds an interconnecting financial landscape of businesses that utilize its digital asset named buzCoin. buzCoin is a digitized ounce of silver. Blubuzzard, Inc. is based in Dunedin, Florida. Blubuzzard, Inc. is a subsidiary of Lykato Group, LLC.
